## Before you submit

FocusED has a deliberately narrow design philosophy. Please read these before writing your request — it'll save time for both of us.

**Features that will not be accepted:**
- ❌ Anything gamified (badges, rewards, leaderboards, streaks designed to be addictive)
- ❌ Re-engagement notifications ("You haven't checked your stats today!")
- ❌ Social features of any kind
- ❌ Colour accents (the monochrome design is intentional)
- ❌ Features that require new sensitive permissions without exceptional justification
- ❌ Cloud sync, accounts, or any data leaving the device
